days.title: Intro
days.description: Mastering the loop between human intent and AI execution.
days.mindset: You are the Architect. The LLM is your Project Manager. Project IDX is your Lead Developer. You don't need to speak the machine's language fluently; you just need to guide the conversation.

exercises.name: 1. The Kickstart: AI Blueprinting
exercises.note: Describe your vision in plain English to generate a No-Code Implementation Plan.

exercises.name: 2. The Implementation: Anti-Gravity (IDX)
exercises.note: Feed your plan into Project IDX to generate the initial codebase and see a tangible preview instantly.

exercises.name: 3. The Review: Strategic Feedback
exercises.note: Identify changes and describe adjustments back to an LLM to generate a Focused Update Plan.

exercises.name: 4. The Iteration: Refine and Repeat
exercises.note: Move back and forth between the plan and implementation until the project perfectly matches your vision.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlifts
exercises.note: Hinge at the hips. Keep the bar close to your shins.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Rows
exercises.note: Squeeze shoulder blades together. Do not use momentum.

exercises.name: Mobility Flow
exercises.note: Focus on hip openers and thoracic extension.
